content: Your completion is recorded, keep follow up of form.

comment.text: This translation key is used for the "In Progress" status badge in a file filling form. It appears on the form's status indicator and displays when the form is currently being processed. The translated text will be shown to users indicating that their completion has been recorded and they should follow up with the form.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian translation is incomplete. The English text says 'keep follow up of form', but the Armenian translation 'Շարունակեք հետևել' (Continue to follow) ends abruptly without specifying what to follow (the form), making the sentence grammatically and logically unfinished.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ձեր լրացումը գրանցված է, շարունակեք հետևել ձևին:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Russian translation 'продолжить отслеживание формы' uses an infinitive verb which sounds like a command or a button label, whereas the English 'keep follow up of form' (though grammatically awkward in English) implies a continuous action or instruction for the user to monitor the form. More importantly, the Russian phrasing is unnatural for a status badge.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ваше заполнение сохранено, следите за изменениями в форме.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation 'පෝරමය අනුගමනය කරන්න' (Follow the form) is a literal and incorrect translation of 'keep follow up of form'. In this context, it implies 'tracking' or 'monitoring' the status of the form, whereas the current translation sounds like an instruction to physically follow a document.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ඔබේ සම්පූර්ණ කිරීම වාර්තා කර ඇත, පෝරමයේ ප්‍රගතිය පිළිබඳව අවධානයෙන් සිටින්න.
